summaryEn: Townhouse community in Everett acquired in 2019 and sold in 2022 before the interest rate hike—strategic foresight in a transforming suburban market.
summaryZh: 埃弗里特联排社区，2019 年收购、2022 年利率上行前出售——体现对城郊市场的前瞻判断。
bodyEn: Townhouse community in Everett acquired in 2019 and sold in 2022 before the interest rate hike—strategic foresight in a transforming suburban market.
bodyZh: 埃弗里特联排社区，2019 年收购、2022 年利率上行前出售——体现对城郊市场的前瞻判断。
